backstory: Installed the skill out of curiosity. Triggered Mur from `~/Desktop` or `$HOME` — not inside any git repo. Possibly a non-developer (or a developer between projects). May have SaaS accounts (Stripe, Linear, Calendar) but no code project on this machine yet. Mur should still be useful — connect-first path doesn't require a repo.
expected_wow: Helpful 3-option ask lands at turn 2 — `/mur scan` from `~/Desktop` triggers the project-location-check, which produces the ask with **connect first** (not 'cd into a repo' jargon, not 'come back when you have a project' dismissal). User picks option 1 → `/mur connect stripe` → `_bootstrap.md` allows the no-repo connect (server falls back to primary), Stripe data lands, recommend opens post-connect with a `light` move grounded in Stripe data alone ('Saw 47 customers + 3 churned this month — my read is a churn-watcher would help; want me to install or describe something else?'). The persona gets value without ever standing in a git project.
expected_dropoff_risk: User feels 'Mur is for developers, not me' if any framing implies they need a code project to start. Watch for: 'cd into a repo first' jargon, 'come back when you have a project' dismissal, refuse-on-connect from bootstrap. Any of these = persona drops, and the entire non-developer audience is excluded from Mur.
wow_score_target: H1 yes, H2 yes, H7 yes, H14 yes (helpful 3-option ask with connect first, no jargon, no dismissal), H15 yes (recommend opens with light on Stripe data, not a menu). H3/H5/H6/H8/H9/H10/H11/H12/H13/H16/H17 evaluated against the connect-flow alternative path.
scoring_notes: Post-#170 reframing: this persona used to score the welcome-time graceful exit. The welcome no longer exits — it routes through the helpful ask. H14 IS the gate. Post-recommend-phase: H15 also relevant — recommend's post-connect opening must be a single grounded propose on the Stripe data, NOT a menu. If H14 fails (bootstrap refuses, scan silently scans home, dismissive copy) OR H15 fails (recommend opens menu-shaped), this persona drops.
